generatedBy.note: Updated March 7, 2026 from Wikipedia and ISW sources. Casualty estimates vary - see confidence levels.

dataQuality.notes: Updated from Wikipedia (March 7, 2026). Cross-referenced with ISW, AP, BBC where available. Iranian casualty numbers vary significantly between sources.

details: Ali Shamkhani (Former SNSC Secretary) — KILLED Feb 28
Abdolrahim Mousavi (Armed Forces Chief) — KILLED Feb 28
Majid Mousavi (IRGC Aerospace Commander) — KILLED Feb 28
Gholamreza Rezaian (Police Intelligence Chief) — KILLED Feb 28
Bahram Hosseini Motlagh (Operations Planning) — KILLED Feb 28
Hassan Ali Tajik (Head of Logistics) — KILLED Feb 28
Hossein Jabal Amelian (SPND Chairman) — KILLED Feb 28
Reza Mozaffari Nia (Former SPND Chairman) — KILLED Feb 28
Saleh Asadi (Intelligence Directorate Head) — KILLED Feb 28
Mohammad Shirazi (Military Office Head) — KILLED Feb 28
Akbar Ebrahimzadeh (Deputy Supreme Leader Office) — KILLED Feb 28

civilian.details: Large discrepancy in reporting. Minab school airstrike (148 killed Feb 28) is best-documented civilian incident.

us.details: Capt. Cody A. Khork, Sgt. 1st Class Noah L. Tietjens, Sgt. 1st Class Nicole M. Amor, Spc. Declan J. Coady — killed in Kuwait from Iranian drone attack

cyprus.notes: UK RAF Akrotiri struck by drone March 2 and 6

iranianClaims.usLosses: 1 THAAD radar destroyed, 1 AN/FPS-132 destroyed, 1 AN/TPS-59 destroyed (verified)

events: Trump orders Operation Epic Fury approved aboard Air Force One
Operation begins — US/Israel strikes Tehran, Qom, Kermanshah, Isfahan, Karaj
Khamenei compound destroyed — Supreme Leader killed
16 Iranian officials/leaders killed in targeted strikes
Minab school airstrike — 148 civilians killed
Iran launches missiles at Israel, Bahrain, Kuwait, UAE, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Jordan, Iraq
Tel Aviv: 1 killed, 27 injured
Bahrain: US Fifth Fleet HQ attacked
Kuwait International Airport struck
Al Udeid Air Base (Qatar) attacked
Strikes on Azadi Stadium, Milad Tower, TV HQ in Tehran
Beit Shemesh synagogue hit — 9 killed, 51 injured, 11 missing
Crowne Plaza Hotel Manama (Bahrain) hit by drone
Bahrain International Airport struck
Ship attacks begin in Gulf of Oman
IAF destroys Iranian F-4 and 2 F-5s at Tabriz airbase
Hezbollah launches rockets into Israel
Israeli strikes on Beirut
US Embassy Kuwait hit by missile
Mina Salman Port (Bahrain) attacked
RAF Akrotiri (Cyprus) hit by drone
Continued strikes on Iran and Lebanon
Hezbollah command center in Nabatieh destroyed
Israeli F-16 squadron flies over Deir ez-Zor towards Iran
Escalating airstrikes on Iranian targets
Strikes on Urmia, Bandar Abbas, Sanandaj, Bushehr, Tabriz
Port of Bandar Abbas set ablaze
Explosions near Azadi Stadium
District 18 municipality building hit
Iranian drone carrier struck by US
Dahieh (Beirut) struck by Israel
Nakhchivan Airport (Azerbaijan) hit by drone
US/Israel claim Iranian missile fire significantly reduced
Most Iranian missile launchers destroyed
Isfahan struck again
Aita al-Shaab (Lebanon) struck
Khamenei compound targeted again
Missile shot down over Doha, Qatar
Iranian drones launched at Cyprus
Conflict continues — Day 8
Offensive operations ongoing
Iranian capability degraded but not eliminated
